case_title: SILVIO LOPES DE OLIVEIRA VS. AKBAR MOINI NAZERI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,635.00 FILED BY LOPES DE OLIVEIRA, SILVIO AS TO DEFENDANT NAZERI, AKBAR MOINI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 -JPT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPES DE OLIVEIRA, SILVIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAZERI, AKBAR MOINI $85.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED APR-02-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NAZERI, AKBAR MOINI
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEPT 506. FILED BY DEFENDANT NAZERI, AKBAR MOINI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
